label: Webring
summary: Fills an rs-webring-bar from a ring's JSON, computing prev/random/next.
era: Sites holding hands in a circle, curated by a ringmaster.

classes.name: rs-webring-bar
classes.role: the host the widget fills with links

options.name: src
options.note: the ring JSON; or an inline <script type=application/json>

a11y: Plain links, fully functional as static HTML. Works from an inline ring with no service at all.
